creator: ino-qc@spotteswoode.de.eu.org
text:
> John Merryweather Cooper:

> There was a change in the way PCI probing in CURRENT recently.  The
> patch to Xorg has already been uploaded, and all I needed to get nv
> working again was to cvsup and rebuild.  After doing that, it works
> just fine for me.

thanks for this info! but what do i rebuild? i already cvsup'ed
before posting and rebuilt ports/x11-drivers/xf86-video-nv and
ports/x11-servers.  are there any libs in base involved, do i need to
rebuild world?


regards, clemens
